name: TARGET_COMBINATIONS_BY_ORIGIN_TARGET
description: Target combinations by origin target. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (o:Origin {name: $origin})<-[:ORIGIN_FROM]-(a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair)-[:HAS_TARGET]->(t0:Target {symbol: $target})
RETURN DISTINCT tp.name AS target_pair, collect(DISTINCT a.name)[0..5] AS assignees, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, target_pair
LIMIT 10

examples: For the leading combinations from China that contain IL5RA, what target-pair combinations are involved in those patents?
For the leading combinations from US that contain FGFR2, what target-pair combinations are involved in those patents?
For the leading combinations from Personal that contain IL4R, what target-pair combinations are involved in those patents?
